title: Tibetiodes yunnanensis
taxonomy: Tibetiodes yunnanensis is classified as a species of moth in the family Gelechiidae. This family, which consists of approximately 6,000 species, is commonly known as the twirler moths. Gelechiidae is a relatively small family within the larger order of Lepidoptera, which includes all butterflies and moths. The classification of Tibetiodes yunnanensis also places it within the order Lepidoptera and the class Insecta. Further classification would include its kingdom, phylum, and other taxonomic levels.
